title: Hi, {name}
subtitle: Your identity, your picks across the tournament, and a settings drawer — all in one place.

editDialog.title: Edit your details
editDialog.description: Update your name and username. Email stays the same.
editDialog.error: Couldn't save your changes — please try again.

pickemPeek.title: Your pickem
pickemPeek.subtitle: Groups, best thirds and bracket — at a glance.
pickemPeek.subtitleLocked: The tournament is live — your picks are sealed.
pickemPeek.noChampion: Finish your bracket to crown a champion.
pickemPeek.lockedNoChampionDescription: You didn't crown a champion before the tournament locked.

boardsPeek.title: Your boards
boardsPeek.subtitle: Every league you're competing in.
boardsPeek.emptyDescription: Join a friend's board with a code or start your own league.
boardsPeek.loadError: Couldn't load your boards. Refresh to try again.

calendarPeek.title: Your calendar
calendarPeek.subtitle: Last played and what's next.
calendarPeek.empty: No matches available yet — the tournament hasn't started.

sessions.subtitle: Sessions where your account is currently active.
sessions.loadError: Couldn't load your sessions. Refresh to try again.
sessions.revokeError: Couldn't sign that device out — please try again.
sessions.revokeAllError: Couldn't sign out from all devices — please try again.
